summary: Vibrant historic show captured on a decent matrix remix; lively crowd and party‑favorite jams shine through.
review: Both reviewers rave about the energy of this historic concert, calling it beautiful, bouncy and a great experience with memorable party favorites. The matrix‑type source provided by Roger Eichorn is described as a decent copy that preserves the chaotic but enjoyable atmosphere, though no specific audio‑quality issues are noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Two high‑rating reviews (5★ and 4★) highlight a strong performance and an acceptable recording, leading to a solid combined score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a decent copy of the matrix remix; no major flaws mentioned, but also no detailed praise of clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers emphasize the historic vibe and crowd interaction, noting that the set delivered many party‑favorite moments and a lively, chaotic atmosphere.
